name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Codex-only 1.5.6-codex.1 keeps Codex Custom Agents and local RAG while removing default external model workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-only agent workflow with Custom Agents, engineering gates, and local RAG memory.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Codex-only is a Codex-led branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex and Codex Custom Agents handle planning, implementation, review, test strategy, command execution, RAG curation, and final decisions. The MCP server exposes only local configuration status and RAG tools by default, with no external model tool surface or provider key requirement.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Codex-only for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and may delegate to Codex Custom Agents while using local RAG memory.
